name: Video Summarization
description: This process involves creating text summary for the video.
input: It takes in video file path as an input

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured LLM connection that provides authentication and model access for generating video summaries.

fields.name: videoFilePath
fields.title: Select video path
fields.description: Path to the input video file to be analyzed and summarized.

fields.name: summaryLength
fields.title: Select summary length
fields.description: Target length of the generated summary, typically specified as an approximate number of words.

fields.name: language
fields.title: Select language
fields.description: Language in which the summary should be generated. Leave empty to use the default or detected language.

fields.name: saveOutputPath
fields.title: Output path
fields.description: Destination file path where the generated summary text will be saved.
